metadata.description: Optimized conda channels for astrodynamics and space technology
metadata.note: Listed in priority order - first match wins

primary_channels.name: conda-forge
primary_channels.description: Community-driven conda packages - 99% of space tech libs available

specialized_channels.name: bioconda
specialized_channels.description: Bioinformatics tools - useful for space biology experiments

notes: Use prefix.dev mirror for faster downloads globally
conda-forge contains all 68 curated astrodynamics libraries
bioconda is optional - only needed for biological payload analysis
For air-gapped environments, mirror conda-forge internally
